January 1, 1999. If the beneficiary became eligible 
for Medicare after that, the earliest possible date will be some time after his/her coverage start date 
(i.e., the COVSTART variable in the beneficiary file). 

In the 2021–2023 MBSF OTCC files, a small number of records may have an ever date value of 
1/1/1960. In the 2024 file, these have been corrected.
